Frequently asked questions

What is Fitz?
Fitz is an AI-powered HR assistant built specifically for Australian hospitality venues. It helps you generate employment contracts, onboarding checklists, training plans, and provides 24/7 guidance on workplace compliance.
Is it free to try?
Yes! The free plan includes 20 AI chats/month, 1 free template download, and unlimited access to all HR Tools (Award Wizard, Compliance Calendar, etc). Perfect for trying out Fitz before upgrading.
Is it compliant with Australian workplace laws?
Fitz is designed with Australian hospitality awards and Fair Work requirements in mind. However, all documents are provided as templates and should be reviewed by a qualified professional before use.
Can I talk to a real HR expert?
Absolutely! Fitz includes a "Talk to a Consultant" feature that connects you directly with qualified HR professionals for complex situations that need human expertise.

Ready to simplify your HR?

Join Australian hospitality venues saving time and staying compliant.

    🚨

    Senior Consultant Required

    Termination is the highest-risk HR decision

    ⚖️ Why Expert Guidance is Critical:

    • • Unfair dismissal claims can cost $20,000 - $80,000+ in legal fees and compensation
    • • Procedural errors cannot be fixed after termination
    • • General protections claims have severe penalties (up to 6 months salary)
    • • Every termination must follow strict Fair Work procedures

    📋 Documentation Required:

    For Employees Within Probation

    ✓

    Completed Formal Probation Review and Check-In Documents

    For Performance Concerns

    ✓

    Completed 12 Week Performance Improvement Plan

    For Conduct / Behaviour Concerns

    ✓

    Completed Record of Discussion OR Letter of Allegation

    (Depending on severity of misconduct)

    ✓

    Employee's responses and statements

    (All documentation from investigation/discussion process)

    ✓

    Evidence

    (Witness statements, CCTV footage, documentation, etc.)

    ✉️ Need help? support@fitzhr.com

    Consultation Required

    This document requires a professional review before generation.

    Why? Termination and other high-risk documents carry significant legal exposure ($20,000–$80,000+ in potential claims). All termination letters must be reviewed by a senior HR professional to ensure proper process has been followed.

    Terms of Use

    ⚠️ CRITICAL NOTICE

    This tool provides general information only. It is NOT legal advice and does not create a client-consultant relationship. All guidance and documents must be reviewed by a qualified Fitz HR consultant before use.

    1. Acceptance of Terms

    By accessing the Fitz HR Knowledge Hub, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use this tool.

    2. Nature of Service

    This tool is an information resource, not a professional advisory service. It provides:

    • General HR information for Australian hospitality venues
    • Educational content about Fair Work compliance
    • Draft document templates requiring professional review
    • Reference materials and process guidance

    This tool does NOT provide legal advice or professional HR consulting services.

    3. Professional Review Requirement

    You MUST have all guidance and documents reviewed by a Fitz HR consultant before:

    • Issuing any document to an employee
    • Taking any employment action based on information provided
    • Making legal or compliance decisions
    • Relying on any content for legal proceedings

    4. Limitation of Liability

    Fitz HR is NOT liable for:

    • Decisions made based on information from this tool
    • Use of documents without professional review
    • Inaccuracies or outdated information
    • AI-generated content errors or omissions
    • Legal costs, penalties, or damages arising from use of this tool

    5. Your Responsibilities

    You agree to:

    • Use this tool for informational purposes only
    • Seek professional advice for specific situations
    • Verify all information with official sources
    • Not rely solely on this tool for legal compliance
    • Have all documents professionally reviewed before use

    6. Accuracy and Updates

    While we strive for accuracy, employment law changes frequently. Award rates, regulations, and requirements may have changed since information was last updated. Always verify current requirements at fairwork.gov.au.

    7. Professional Consultation

    For professional HR advice and document review:

    Email: support@fitzhr.com

    Last Updated: January 2026

    Privacy Policy

    1. Information We Collect

    When using this tool, we collect:

    • Conversation data: Your questions and our responses
    • Venue information: Business name, location, staff count (if provided during onboarding)
    • Document data: Employee names and details entered into document templates
    • Usage analytics: Tool usage patterns, features accessed, session duration
    • Access codes: Beta testing access credentials

    2. How We Use Your Information

    • To provide and improve the tool's functionality
    • To analyze usage patterns and feature effectiveness
    • To provide better recommendations and tool suggestions
    • For beta testing feedback and product development

    3. Data Storage

    Your data is stored securely using:

    • Supabase (cloud database provider) - Australian/US servers
    • Browser local storage (for venue profile and preferences)
    • Anthropic Claude API (for AI responses - data not retained by Anthropic)

    4. Data Sharing

    We do NOT sell your data. We may share data with:

    • Fitz HR consultants (when you request professional review or advice)
    • Service providers (Anthropic, Supabase) - under strict confidentiality agreements
    • Legal authorities (if required by Australian law)

    5. Your Rights

    Under Australian Privacy Principles, you have the right to:

    • Access your personal data
    • Request correction of inaccurate data
    • Request deletion of your data
    • Opt out of analytics collection

    6. Security

    We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure databases, and access controls. However, no system is 100% secure.

    7. Contact Us

    For privacy concerns or data requests:

    Email: privacy@fitzhr.com

    Last Updated: January 2026

    📖 How to Export Your Data

    📅

    From Deputy

    1. Log into Deputy → Click Rosters
    2. Select your date range (e.g., next 30 days)
    3. Click Export → Choose Excel or CSV
    4. Save the file, then upload it here using Import Data
    💰

    From Xero

    1. Log into Xero → Go to Payroll → Employees
    2. Click Export to Excel at the top right
    3. For payroll data: Go to Pay Runs → Select period → Export
    4. Save the file, then upload it here using Import Data
    📊

    From Other Systems (MYOB, QuickBooks, etc.)

    Export your roster or employee data as CSV or Excel format. Our AI will automatically detect the columns and map your data correctly.

    💡
    Pro Tip

    Include these columns for best results: Employee Name, Date, Start Time, End Time, Position, Hours. Our AI is smart enough to handle different column names and formats!

    📋

    Employment Contract Builder – Terms of Use

    Please read carefully before creating contracts

    ⚠️ Important Notice

    By using the Fitz HR Employment Contract Builder, you agree to these Terms of Use. These terms set out important information about how the tool must be used and the legal consequences of incorrect use.

    📚 This is an Information Tool

    This tool provides general HR information and contract templates only for Australian hospitality venues. It is NOT a substitute for professional HR or legal advice. All contracts generated should be reviewed by a qualified professional.

    ✅ Your Obligations

    On each occasion that you use this tool, you represent and warrant that:

    • The information you input is true and accurate
    • You have authority to create employment contracts for your organisation
    • You will provide prospective employees all required documentation including the Fair Work Information Statement
    • You will not re-use or repurpose generated contracts for other businesses
    • You will undertake the entire process from the beginning for each new contract
    • You know and will properly apply the award that covers the employee

    ⚖️ Compliance with Laws

    You must ensure that:

    • Your use of any generated contract complies with the Fair Work Act 2009 (Cth) and applicable awards
    • You supply the Fair Work Information Statement with any contract
    • You pay employees the correct amount including all allowances, loadings, and entitlements
    • You do not engage in any misleading or deceptive conduct

    📝 By Using This Tool You Acknowledge

    • Nothing in this tool constitutes legal advice
    • Guidance is general in nature and may not apply to your specific circumstances
    • You are solely responsible for seeking legal advice on laws that apply to you as an employer
    • The law may change at any time and contract provisions may be superseded
    • You use this tool at your own risk

    🛡️ Limitation of Liability

    Fitz HR makes no representation or warranty regarding the performance, accuracy, reliability, fitness for purpose, or availability of this tool. We exclude all liability for any direct or indirect loss or damage whatsoever arising from your use of, or reliance on, this tool or any generated contracts.

    🚨 Professional Review Required

    All generated contracts should be reviewed by a qualified HR professional or employment lawyer before being issued to employees. If you are a Fitz HR client, please submit contracts for review. Incorrect contracts may expose you to legal risks including underpayment claims and unfair dismissal proceedings.
